## Description
[Provide a clear and concise description of the changes introduced by this PR. Explain WHY this change is needed, not just WHAT was changed.]

## Related Issue
Put x into the brackets to mark the selected option.
Also, replace the corresponding placeholder for the issue number.
- [ ] Resolves #[Insert Issue Number Here].
- [ ] Related to #[Insert Issue Number Here].
- [ ] No relevant issue.

## Type of Change
Put x into the brackets to mark the selected type of change.
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (code improvement, no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation change (fix or add documentation, no functional changes)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality not to work as expected)

## Pre-Review Checklist for Author
Before requesting a review, please ensure you have completed the following steps:
Put x into the brackets to mark the selected checklist item as completed.
- [ ] I have linked the corresponding Issue.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review or self-test of my own code.
- [ ] I have fetched the latest `master` and rebased my branch (`git rebase origin/master`).
- [ ] I have resolved all merge conflicts locally.
- [ ] My code successfully passes all local tests and build checks.
- [ ] I have listed my teammate below to let them know.

## Reviewers
Please @ your teammate here to keep them updated on your progress.

## Reviewer Guidelines
- Verify that the PR branch is fully synced with `master` (no complex merge commits).
- Verify that the CI actions have completed.
- Ensure the "Squash and merge" option is used upon approval if merging into `master`.
